pillar_metadata.name: Relation
pillar_metadata.description: The network of interactions between entities; enables exchange and feedback loops.

resource_exchange.impact: Facilitates the flow of info/resources between connected organizational nodes.

weight_amplification.impact: Increases systemic dependency by demonstrating high network centrality.

isolation.result: Information silos; the unit cannot receive or send resources to the wider system.

over_dependence.result: Systemic fragility; the unit is so interconnected that its failures destabilize neighbors.
